title: Honkai Star Rail Animation Project by MAPPA Reveals Concept Trailer
content: Honkai: Star Rail X MAPPA original animation project revealed a concept trailer, which is titled “Death in the Afternoon.” Not many details were shared about the project, with only the director and character designer revealed.
author: Anime Corner

title: One Piece: The True Meaning of Luffy’s Dream Is Lost to International Fans
content: One Piece shocked fans in the Wano Country Saga after revealing that Luffy’s true dream can only be achieved after he becomes the Pirate King. For over two decades, the series led fans to believe that Luffy’s dream is to reach Laughtale and achieve true freedom.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Anime Studio Returns With a New Release After AI Controversy
content: The anticipated Spring 2026 anime season marked the return of one of the most beloved isekai of all time, Season 4 of Ascendance of a Bookworm . Ajia-do studio produced the first three seasons, but the latest season was picked up by WIT Studio, one of the most renowned animation studios in the country.
author: ComicBook

title: The Apothecary Diaries Star Opens Up About Season 2’s Best Character: “I’m Glad She Is Alive”
content: The Apothecary Diaries Season 3 is still a few months away, and it’s going to be more exciting than ever. The story took a major turn in the second season’s finale and will continue to surprise fans with more mysteries and plot twists.
author: ComicBook

title: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 Releases Opening Movie Video
content: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 has revealed its opening movie video following the premiere of Episode 1. Crunchyroll is streaming the anime worldwide. Studios Actas and Bandai Namco Pictures animated the first season of Wistoria: Wand and Sword , with Tatsuya Yoshihara as the director.
author: Anime Corner

title: MARRIAGETOXIN Reveals Water Master Arc Visual Alongside Episode 2 Preview
content: MARRIAGETOXIN anime revealed the Episode 2 preview images and synopsis, along with a new visual for the Water Master Arc . Studio BONES Film is handling the animation production, which premiered on April 3 . MARRIAGETOXIN Episode 2 is titled “What is ‘Charm,’ Anyway?” and will premiere on Crunchyroll on April 14.
author: Anime Corner

title: Spoiler Summary Website Operator Convicted With Suspended Sentence
content: The court found the spoiler articles to exceed fair use and violate copyright law. According to the court, a creation of a work in a different form without permission violates copyright law if it retains "essential characteristics" of the original.
author: ANN

title: Gundam: “Ancient” Mech Statue in Real-Life’s Origins Reveald
content: Mobile Suit Gundam as a franchise is one of the oldest mech series to ever grace the anime world, first starting in the 1970s and still releasing a steady stream of television shows and movies to this day.
author: ComicBook

title: Invincible Season 4 Drops Major Transformers Easter Egg (And You Probably Missed It)
content: Invincible’s fourth season released one of its hardest-hitting episodes earlier this week, with the penultimate installment seeing Mark Grayson’s fight against Thragg and the Viltrumite Empire ramping up.
author: ComicBook

title: Regular Show Planning Major Event For The Lost Tapes Premiere
content: After years out of the limelight, Cartoon Network is preparing to bring back Mordecai, Rigby, and the other animated employees of the park from Regular Show . Regular Show: The Lost Tapes is an upcoming spin-off arriving next month, seemingly taking place during the original eight-season series.
author: ComicBook
